title: Licaria meissneri
intro: Licaria meissneri, also known as Licaria or Yellow Licaria, is a plant species belonging to the family Calophyllaceae, native to Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, inflammation, and respiratory problems, due to its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The bioactive constituents of Licaria meissneri include alkaloids, flavonoids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The plant is commonly used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory infections.
